name: Bùi Đức Anh
title: Project Manager / QA Tester
profile: Detail-oriented Project Manager and QA Tester with strong organizational and problem-solving skills. Experienced in coordinating team workflows, ensuring product quality, and delivering projects on time. Passionate about improving user experience through structured testing and efficient project execution.

desc: Managed project timeline, task distribution, and team coordination.
Designed and executed test cases to ensure system quality.
Tracked bugs and reported issues using Jira.
Collaborated with developers to fix and verify defects.
Performed manual testing on web applications.
Wrote test cases and test reports.
Identified UI/UX issues and reported bugs.

name: Đoàn Vũ Hà Anh
title: Frontend Developer
profile: Frontend Developer with hands-on experience delivering responsive and user-centric web applications. Strong in building scalable UI, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and translating business requirements into high-quality products. Proven ability to take ownership of features, optimize performance, and improve user experience in real-world projects.

desc: Developed and maintained a responsive e-commerce web application for mobile users.
Owned key UI features including product listing, search, cart, and checkout flows.
Collaborated with backend developers to integrate APIs and ensure seamless data flow.
Improved page performance and user experience through UI optimization techniques.
Participated in testing, debugging, and resolving production issues.
Led frontend development for a food ordering system with a focus on usability and clean design.
Designed and implemented responsive interfaces across multiple devices.
Worked closely with designers to translate UI/UX concepts into functional interfaces.
Enhanced user engagement by optimizing layout, navigation, and interaction flow.
Ensured cross-browser compatibility and consistent performance.
Developed a role-based management system supporting Admin, Trainer, and Member workflows.
Implemented core features including user management, service tracking, and authentication.
Applied MVC architecture and managed session handling for secure access control.
Integrated frontend with backend services using Java (JSP/Servlet) and SQL Server.
Collaborated in a team environment, contributing to system design and feature planning.

name: Mai Đoàn Trung Kiên
title: Backend Developer
profile: Passionate about building scalable backend systems.

name: Trần Nguyễn Đức Anh
title: UX/UI Designer
profile: Designing intuitive interfaces for better user experiences.

desc: Built a full-stack interview management application using Next.js and TypeScript.

Deployed the application on Vercel at interview-app-olive-phi.vercel.app.

Developed a personal Portfolio website using Vite, TypeScript and CSS.

Deployed the application on Vercel at duc-portfolio-seven.vercel.app.

name: Hoàng Đức Thuận
title: Mobile Developer
profile: Crafting native and cross-platform mobile apps.
